name: Anywhere Door
info: A portal that can transport the user to any location instantaneously.

name: Take-Copter
info: A small helicopter-like device that allows the user to fly and travel quickly.

name: Time Machine
info: Travel through time, past or present, on this ride. It is connected inside Noby39s desk drawer.

name: Memory Bread
info: Take this loaf of bread and place it on writing that you want to memorize, eat it, and its in your head.

name: Small Light
info: Anything will become smaller when it is lit with this.

name: Translation Jelly
info: Eat this and youll understand any language.

name: Time Cloth
info: A cloth that allows the user to time travel by wrapping it around themselves.

name: Time TV
info: A device that allows the user to watch past or future events on television.

name: Air Cannon
info: A device that can create a gust of wind to propel the user.

name: Invisibility Cape
info: Wear this cape and you will become invisible, and no one would see you.

name: Computer Pencil
info: When one writes something with it, it will write the correct answer no matter what.

name: Space Capsule
info: Space Capsule is a gadget that can transport its user to any location in the universe.

name: Substitution Rope
info: The Substitution Rope is a gadget that allows the user to switch places with another object or person.

name: Gravity Paint
info: A gadget that allows the user to paint in mid-air by manipulating gravity.

name: Hypnosis Pendulum
info: A gadget that allows the user to control the minds of others.

name: Big Light
info: A gadget that emits a bright beam of light capable of illuminating large areas or blinding enemies temporarily.

name: Scheduler Clock
info: The Scheduler Clock is used to plan events of any kind

name: The Woodcutters Pond
info: Drop something in this and a spirit android appears!

name: Lie Speaker
info: Hold this bullhorn up to your mouth and tell a lie, and that lie will then become truth.

name: Invitation Pill
info: Invitation Pillis a gadget to use on someone whom you want to call to a certain place.

name: Animal Beam
info: Aim the light on anyone and he/she will turn into an animal.

name: Skyhorse
info: This is a new creature of the 22nd century  a fusion of a horse and a bamboo

name: Magic Encylopedia
info: The user can use it to do any kind of magic by writing the incantation/method in book and its "spell effect"

name: Random Disk
info: It may be used for a number of purposes, hence the name "random"

name: Lost & Found Fishing Pond
info: Tell this gadget what you have lost and where you lost it.

name: Season Selector
info: Dial to one of the four seasons and it will immediately turn into that season.

name: Indoor Fishing Pond
info: This will display waters of an ocean or river in 4-D.

name: Teru Teru Bozu
info: When the user raises the rod, the rain will stop.

name: Almighty Pass
info: This gadget is used to make the user pass into any place.

name: Guiding Angel
info: Put this on your hand and ask for advice and it will tell what would be the best for you.

name: Image Light Cap
info: If someone puts the cap on and points it at an incident that is happening at the moment, it will change and turn into what the user thinks will happen.

name: Flattening Iron
info: Use this gadget against any object (also works on people) and it will turn the object into a paper-like thinness.

name: Peko Peko Grasshopper
info: The Peko Peko Grasshopper will jump into a person39s nose to the point of where the target will eventually cry and beg for forgiveness.

name: Tax Bird
info: Tax Birdis a gadget that collects tax out of your income money, savings, and allowance. The tax increases proportionately for those who have more money.

name: Whooshinator
info: Turn on this fan, and itll create strong winds thatll blow anything away.

name: Any-Maker
info: Just as its name suggests the gadget is capable of making and copying anything.

name: Voodoo Camera
info: When used, Voodoo Camera is able to spawn voodoo dolls relevant to the targeted person.

name: Railroad Crossing Kit
info: Place it on the ground and anything that is behind or in front it will be forced to stop and cannot go ahead or cross the line.

name: Spy Set
info: The whole Spy Set looks like a head of a robot with one eye and a left ear. The 39head39 has an antenna, which receives transmissions from the eye and ear.

name: Denkomaru
info: The Denkomaru acts as a parrying weapon and also doubles as an instant knock-out finisher.

name: Instant Chocolate Maker
info: When an object is placed on the gadget, the gadget produces a chocolate with the shape of the certain object. The chocolate produced by the gadget is delicious.

name: Transformation Headband
info: The gadget gives the wearer girly hairstyle, skirt, pink-cheek, lipstick and long eyelashes. If the wearer tells their fake name while wearing it.

name: Sampling Spoon
info: Using the gadget, the user can taste samples of several foods from the magazines, books or pictures.

name: Action Quizzer
info: A quiz game  you answer questions by actually going all over the world, using a gadget of the future. 4 quizzes make 1 round, and when you're correct you'll get a gold medal.

name: Blind Spot Stars
info: By wearing this gadget, the user becomes 39invisible39 through the physiological effect of other people39s blind spot.

name: Dream DirectorS Chair
info: Sit in this and youll be able to direct and change what someone else is dreaming about.

name: Doc In A Box
info: Put the sensor on the patient, and it will tell you the name of your disease. Itll give you medicine to cure it too.

name: Imitation Dummy
info: The Imitation Dummy may copy a person39s appearance and other aspects on command.

name: Various Soda Set
info: The gadget consists of six glasses of soda of different "flavors" packaged in a carrier.

name: Transformade
info: Drink this, and think of an animal that you would like to be, and you'll be able to transform yourself into that creature

name: Robinson Crusoe Set
info: Haped like a barrel, containing items like 'My House Gas' and 'Food-Seeking Glasses' to help survive on an uninhabited island.

name: Spartan-Style Overcoming Tablets
info: The gadget has the objective to make a user overcome his fear by making it more frightening.

name: Doublixir
info: A drop of this potion on something  and it doubles every 5 minutes.

name: White Water Mountain
info: It is a mini mountain model where Matsutake can be grown with a little changes.

name: Squarer
info: Drink this, and it makes mellow people turn square, sharp, tight and strict.

name: Flowering Ash
info: By sowing this ash, beautiful flowers can bloom anywhere, including in the air.

name: Dress-Up Camera
info: The Dress Up Camera is able to override the person39s attire with whatever image inserted inside it.

name: Adaptation Light
info: When used upon someone, the gadget allows them to live in any environment like under-water or in space.

name: Flashbang
info: The Flashbang causes a loud yet harmless explosion and a gust of smoke upon detonation.

name: Spiritual Lei
info: A gadget that allow the wearer to transform into any type of ghosts they want to.

name: Realpedia
info: Open the page and slap the spine of this book, and out comes the real thing!

name: Dreamer Tv
info: Take a look at someone elses nightly dreams with this television.

name: Buddy Beacon & Remote
info: Stick the capsule on your targets body and switch on the remote, and the person will absolutely love you as a best friend.

name: Over-Exaggerating Overcoat
info: This item greatly exaggerates everything around the user as long as it remains on them.

name: Cancellation Eraser
info: The Cancellation Eraser is for revoking the effect of the gadget pen, Face-Doodling Pen.

name: Esper Hat
info: Its function is to use ESP Training if you use your mind

name: Invisibility Lacquer
info: Spray this on an object, and it will become invisible.

name: Infinity Lasso
info: A strike of these ropes and youll be able to pull over anything from anywhere.

name: The Life Do-Over Machine
info: The Do-Over Machine can let the user to do-over machine in "that" age that user wants.

name: Hundred-Year Capsule
info: A time-machine capsule turn the dial to red and it will take you 100 years in the past turn it to blue and you're 100 years in the future instantly.

name: Dupli-Mirror
info: Duplicate anything you want by showing it through the mirror.

name: Bounce Back Cape
info: Wave this cape and you can fend off anything.

name: Insect Pills
info: It gives the user the power to fly like a butterfly.

name: Helping Hand Spray
info: Users have to put their hands in the gas that comes out and it will make gloves out of the hands.

name: Time Valve
info: You can adjust the flow of time with this.

name: Dividing Blade
info: It allows the user to divide anything into two or more pieces by cutting it with the sword.

name: Genie-Less Magic Lamp
info: Point the lamp towards someone and say his/her name, and that person will get sucked inside!

name: Space Wars Game Set
info: A game from the future, which protects a three-dimensional image of outer space throughout your room while you pilot a mini fighter spaceship.

name: Storybook Slippers
info: Wear these shoes and step on a picture book, and you'll be able to go into the world of that book.

name: Time Belt
info: This is what you would use when for some reason you cant use the Time Machine. It can make you move back and forth in time, but you cannot specify a location.

name: Compact 2-D Camera
info: It can store anything as a photograph, making cleaning up a breeze. Just pour hot water on the photo to return the object to its original state.

name: Imprinting Egg
info: The user will need to put a person inside the gadget. After 15 minutes, he/she will be in love with the first person.

name: Work Map Set
info: This gadget allows the user to experience work. By stabbing the attached pin into the place where he wants to work.

name: Teleporting Submarine
info: It can teleport from one body of water to another. Grows or shrinks in size depending on the spaciousness of the water body. It39s in its normal size when it39s on land.

name: Helping Hat
info: The Helping Hat has an antennae that detects the nearest person in trouble and guides its user to them. It seems to have a set range.

name: Hustler
info: If one put this on his/her back and wind the screw, his/her movement will be quicker and will be able to move smoothly.

name: Hardship Miso
info: One taste of this miso, and anything you do will end up being hard and painful for you.

name: Timed Stupidity Bomb
info: The bomb has a timer that must be activated before it can detonate. If anything was caught in its area of effect.

name: Dream Projector
info: Point the antenna to someone who is dreaming in their sleep, and you'll receive the dream. You can project it on the Dream Screen to see.

name: Polarity Patches
info: Like magnets, people wearing the same patches will repel, and those wearing the opposite patches will attract.

name: MoodmakerOrchestra
info: Listen to the music this orchestra plays  and it will enhance your mood, making you joyful or tearful depending on the music.

name: Absconding Leaf
info: Place this leaf on the head of a Japanese raccoon-dog or another weak animal in the same genus (such as a dog).

name: Danger Bomb
info: The Danger Bomb detonates after a set fuse time when thrown or upon being remotely triggered.

name: Truthbeaker
info: Put this on your mouth and tell a lie, and it would all become the truth!

name: Hermit House
info: So strong it wont even break with explosives, youll be safe and sound living inside this. Its comfortable too!

name: Animal Crackers
info: These are crackers shaped like animals. Youll transfrom into the animal that you ate!

name: Resolution Door
info: First a user must tell what problems he/she want to solve and then he/she will go inside the door.

name: Magic Eyes
info: The user places the eyes on a gadget and wears it. The gadget then creates an attraction electric wave that causes anyone who look at the user in the eyes to become attracted to them.

name: Ninja Action Gear
info: Become a Ninja! Included: Ninja hood(makes you invisible), super sandals (makes you run fast & jump high).

name: Instant Robot
info: Assemble the robot parts and take a scan of a persons brain  and it will serve as a substitute for that person.

name: Incredible Fort
info: It is a turret gadget that is about the size of a room, its user sets it somewhere, points it at someone and signal "Fire!", and anyone can shoot at will.

name: Sequence Spray
info: Spray this on pictures and photos, and youll be able to see what happens next.

name: Mochi-Maker
info: A machine from the future which produces mochi, or Japanese rice cakes.

name: Instant Pitfall
info: It is used to create a pitfall, which is basically something like a hole in the ground used for hiding.

name: Crude-But-Charming Spray
info: Spray this on a poorly-drawn sketch, or badly-written song, and the spray will make it look and sound amazing.

name: Instant Wardrobe Cam
info: Put a picture of clothes or fashon designs that you like in this camera and snap it at the person you want to dress.

name: Sokay Stick
info: If you find someone who is extremely mad, put this wand over their moth and their anger wil be pacified!

name: Ship Bottler
info: Ship Bottler is a gadget capable of making a miniature copy of any ship you find, and placing it in a bottle.

name: Pass Loop
info: Put this loop where you want to pass through  you'll be able to go through any wall.

name: Amazing Maze
info: Spin this, and it will mix up the rooms and hallways in the house, making the house into a maze.

name: Sooner-Or-Later Eyeballs
info: Sooner-or-Later Eyeballs is a gadget. Set the dial to a certain time in the future, put them in your eyes, and you will be able to see what will happen at that point in the future.

name: What-If Phone Booth
info: The user must enter the booth, take the phone off, then say "What if ____?" , then set the phone down.

name: X-Ray Machine And X-Ray Stickers
info: Put one of the "X-Ray Stickers" on the surface of an object, and no matter how far away the object is.

name: Freeze Framer
info: Similar to a camera, it has a shutter, when the user presses the shutter, the targeted object/person will freeze.

name: Wild Beast-TamingPellets
info: Any animal will obey you when they eat these pellets.

name: Time-Extender Ray
info: Fire this ray, and it will make 10 minutes feel like one hour.

name: Just-As-You-Said Pills
info: Take one of these, and the conditions around you will change to match anything you think or say.

name: Laughing Earbud
info: If a person puts it in their ear, everything they hear turns into a joke that is very funny.

name: The GorgonS Head
info: A fearful gadget that turns people in to a rock with its laser beam that comes out from the eyes.

name: Stretchy Hand
info: Grab hold of things far away with this hand.

name: Come To The Reverse World Oil
info: Upon using, the portal to the Literal Mirror World opened at the virtual water that can soon be accessed.

name: Elder Tree Seed
info: Designed to return the polluted and dying environment back to its original pure state as in the past, making it in a way a gigantic Time Machine.

name: Arrow Of Love
info: Anyone whose hit by this arrow will fall in love with the person who made the shot. The effect will be released once the arrow is removed.

name: Urashima Candy
info: When eaten, all acts of kindness by the user will be rewarded.

name: Gourmet Tablecloth
info: Order what you'd like to eat to this tablecloth, and it'll give you any meal you want.

name: Fear Transferring Baton
info: The gadget allows the user to transfer his fear to someone else for 24 hours.

name: Blueprinter
info: No matter how bad the drawing is, it will re-create your blueprint into perfection.

name: Time Skipping Pulley
info: The gadget allows the user to go ahead minutes or even years in time. But once skipped, he can never go back in time.

name: Black Belt
info: Just tie that belt, and anything that is touched by the user will instantly be thrown off.

name: Thousand Needle Badge
info: When this badge which is shaped like a trout is attached onto the user, any joke the others tell him will turn into reality.

name: Anything Controller
info: When this gadget is placed on any thing, one will be able to control the thing.

name: Girlfriend Catalog
info: The Girlfriend Catalog spawns out multiple images of future girlfriends one may have in the future.

name: Strong Odor Tracking Nose
info: This gadget can be used to elevate the smell sense.

name: Pants Of The Jungle
info: Wear these and youll be as strong as Tarzan! You would also be able to charm any animal.

name: Anywhere Hole
info: If you place this gadget on the ground, it will automatically search for all holes on Earth and connect itself to one of them.

name: Shining Moss
info: When the moss is sprinkled, especially in a dark area, it spreads all over the area very quickly and makes it bright.

name: Incident Bomb
info: A gadget that will predict the user future disaster within ten to thirty seconds after activation.

name: Human Stamp Ink And Absorbing Paper
info: The user has to spray the ink at the person he wants to get a full-body print on.

name: Cooking Badges
info: Say the dishes you want to cook with the badge, and you will become a pro in cooking the dish. If you attach more badges, cooking recipes will come to mind.

name: Plus Vinegar And Minus Vinegar
info: Users say something they want to increase with the Plus Vinegar and sprinkle it with the bottle using the Minus Vinegar will reduce or make disappear something.

name: Hermit Bot
info: This is a robot with the looks of an ragged old man, but if you help him he will grant you three wishes.

name: Decoy Robot
info: Simply place it in the ground and they will lure out the predator from its prey.

name: Mobile Fishing Lake
info: The Mobile Fishing Lake allows it39s user to select a section of water, and then that section of water will be created in the center of the gadget.

name: Switcherator
info: Makes you trade body parts with someone else.

name: Cold Transferer
info: A person with a cold can cough into one end of this gadget, and their cold will instantly be transferred to a person on the other end.

name: Super Gourmet Spice
info: Sprinkle this on and any bad meal will become delicious.

name: Shadowcutter
info: These scissors are for cutting out your shadow. The shadow will work for you at first, but as time goes by it gets smarter  and in 2 hours, it will try to replace you!

name: Instant Miniature-Making Camera
info: Snap a picture with this camera, and it will instantly develop a miniature model that looks exactly like what you took a picture of.

name: Mole Gloves
info: This gadget used to make hole in the ground or create underpass. This gadget can dig the deepest holes and cut through the ground like butter.

name: Tanabata Rocket
info: To use the Tanabata Rocket, the user must use the tags to write the wish that they want, then attach it to the rocket and launch it to the space.

name: Lying Mirror
info: The Lying Mirror merely shows an exaggerated reflection of their user.

name: SonicSolidifier
info: Drink this and say something loud  and the words that you spoke will come out of your mouth in big block letters.

name: Lie 800
info: When consumed, any events said by the user will forcibly occur in the other way around.

name: Fast And Slow Pills
info: When one uses the Fast (Quick in the anime), they become really fast and can39t stop until it wears off.

name: Super Gloves
info: Put these on and youll be super strong!

name: Wrestling Killer Z
info: Wrestling Killer Zis the gadget that one uses to beat somebody up.

name: Indiscriminate Fad-Causing Virus
info: Say any kind of fashion style or item while this virus is cultivating, then send it airborne. It39ll spread through the air, causing whatever you said to become the "in-thing".

name: Time-Ceiver
info: Time-ceiveris a gadget to use when you want place an order for antiques over the phone.

name: Dream Tv
info: As a TV gadget, it shows other people39s dreams. Changing the channel changes the direction and distance the TV scans for, allowing you to see anyone39s dreams.

name: Evo Devo Beam
info: Reflect something with the evolution beam and it will evolve into something in the future do the same using the devolution beam and you'll be able to see what it looked like in the past.

name: Object -O- Hypnotizer
info: Itll hypnotize anything that is not alive.

name: Pet Polish
info: Rub this on a rock and shine it. The rock will come alive and will become attached to you just like a real pet dog.

name: Human Locomotive
info: Put the chimmney on your head, eat the coal cookies and chug down water  youll feel the energy and run very fast!

name: Lucky Cards
info: Automatically grants wishes of the owner. For a wish granted, a card in the deck disappears.

name: Aladdin39S Lamp
info: The Aladdin39s Lamp summons the smoke genie that will grant his master any wishes they want.

name: Study Bot
info: You give orders to this robot and it does the homework and studying for you!

name: Heart Cologne
info: Apply this cologne to a doll, and you39ll be able to understand the feelings in its heart.

name: Photo Suction Stick
info: The gadget allows the user to pull a person out from a photograph. The user has to push the button on the stick to return the person back inside the photograph.

name: Come Here Cat
info: Like a welcoming cat, this will bring you customers that you want to your buisness.

name: Transformation Ring And Cards
info: Insert one of the included cards with a picture of an animal on it into the slot and step through this ring.

name: Story Badge
info: The Badge in the book make user meet the story main character story.

name: Real 3D Glasses
info: When wearing it while watching, all of the objects and people there will emerge out of the TV like a 3D dimensional image.

name: Nose Tube
info: Fill your nose with this little thing, you will be able to breath in the water.

name: Blackhole Pen & WhiteholePen
info: Draw a circle with the blackhole pen and make it suck something inside and it will come out of the circle drawn with the white hole pen.

name: Robot-Ter
info: Tiny granules which each contain a computer. Attach one to a non-moving object, and it will give the object the instruction set it needs to move just like a robot.

name: The PuppetMasters Camera
info: Take someones picute and its replica doll of that person will come out of the camera immediately. Anything you do to the doll, will refelct to the actual person.

name: Later Candy
info: This gadget is used to convey a message to anyone at anytime.

name: Ataru Gun
info: The gun shoots big round homing bullets with eyes which hits the enemy no matter where they go.

name: Blowback Bobby
info: Put a dime in and call out a name who you want to trip. The Tripibnator will trip the person three times no matter what. To cancel, out in a dollar.

name: Rescue Bottle
info: This is one of the example, If there is a people lost or missing in a snowstorm. You will used this to rescue the one.

name: Watermelon Pen
info: It used to make anything turn into watermelon.

name: Great Illusionist Gear
info: Wear this and youll become a Master of Illusions. Youll have to write a letter of challenge before your attempt.

name: Psy Controller
info: The gadget (apparently) used by just holding the chip in the hand, and it will use the user39s brain pulses to control a robot.

name: Rank Badges
info: The person with the highest ranked badge must be obeyed by the people who wear lower ranked badges than this person.

name: Confidence Eliminator
info: Confidence Eliminatoris a gadget. A machine that emits "Confidence-Eliminating Waves" when switched on.

name: Good Points Choice Board
info: The user can increase or decrease his/her own looks (L), power (P) and intelligence (IQ) using this gadget by raising the bar of the specific quality.

name: Picky Eater Corrector
info: This tool makes you eat food that isnt usually your taste.

name: Image Beret
info: By wearing the beret, a person can create a replica of the thing that they39re thinking about.

name: Rain Cloud Maker
info: It can produce clouds that are going to rain.

name: Connection Cap
info: Wear this cap and you'll be able to get to know any one person.

name: Mini-Doras
info: Being smaller clones of Doraemon with different paint jobs, they are sentiment automatons that act as tiny helpers.

name: Portable Ski Slope
info: It makes it possible to practice skiing from right in your own home. If you change direction, the belt will change directions along with you.

name: Equality Missile
info: Extract and boil down some of the dirt under a person39s fingernails, and load it into this missile.

name: Reset Roller
info: This dice will make you rewind time equal to the number you roll. You can optionally restore the changes you have made in the past back to the way it is.

name: Forgetterator
info: Hit a head with this stick and itll make the person forget what happened in the last 10 minutes.

name: Hypnotizing Megaphone
info: Hypnotizing Megaphoneis a gadget that can place any kind of non-living object into a state of hypnosis.

name: Pr
info: PRis a gadget that is an expert in public relations. Tell it something you want publicized, or want people to believe.

name: Substitution Sticker
info: The stickers allow their user to substitute an item for another by writing that object39s name on the sticker, and applying the sticker to an item that they want to "substitute".

name: Assorted Monsters
info: A case containing many varieties of monsters which will become the ally of whoever holds it.

name: Instant Delivery Machine
info: Place an object on the board and this machine will send it to the place displayed on the monitor.

name: Reverse Cloak
info: It used to reverse an attack to backfire/bounce back to the attacker by waving it in front of things coming up.

name: Abekonbe
info: The Abekonbe is a gadget that resembles an arrow with two heads on each opposing sides. It is used to reverse or 39turn39 an object39s function, position or action.

name: Nature Plastic Model Series
info: Each plastic model comes with a pedestal and two halves of an egg shell. One has to set up the pedestal and place the egg shell on the pedestal for the growth process to occur.

name: Energy Valve
info: This gadget is used to increase the usual flow of energy.

name: Gulliver Tunnel
info: Enter the wide side of the tunnel and go out of the other, and youll become mini-sized. Go through it the other way and youre back to normal.

name: Singing Birds Buns
info: The item is a light piece of consumable that temporarily adjusts the user39s voice and greatly improves its quality.

name: Horizon Tape
info: It can be used to create an endless huge area that clearly shows the land meeting the sky i.e. the horizon.

name: Jack Bean
info: It acts like the bean in the traditional fairytale Jack and the Beanstalk.

name: Ultra Ring
info: It is said to make the user thousands of times stronger.

name: Resignation Carrot
info: This gadget is used to make someone resign from his/her position.

name: Inventing Machine
info: Place an order with this machine for any kind of secret gadget you want, and it will invent the gadget and output the plans for the new invention.

name: Obedience Hat
info: The Obedience Hat contains two types. Whoever wears the one with the reticle will be forced to obey all commands of whoever wears the one with the arrow.

name: Mecha Maker
info: Insert a blueprint and raw materials into it and it will create something exactly like the drawing.

name: Super Chopsticks
info: It is a future eating utensil which has same function with original chopsticks. But it can extended wherever the user wants like bridge.

name: Ultra Special Mighty Strong Super Armor
info: It is said to be an invisible gadget which only wise people can see, and wearing this armor can make the user invincible.

name: Family Box
info: It allows the user to swap any of their family members with another person39s family member.

name: SpaceLifeboat
info: This is your escape spacepod in times of danger, like when the earth is going to explode! This would automatically take you to a planet where people would be able to live.

name: Cloud Chow
info: Clouds love to eat this! Use this as bait to catch them.

name: Copy Robot
info: It can mimic multiple attributes of its target, from appearance and physiology to psychology and sentience.

name: Fish Go-Go Gate
info: Set this up in the ocean, and the sea creatures there will swim through it, come out of the Come-Come Gate, and be able to swim through the ground.

name: Somewhere Door
info: Essentially the opposite of the Anywhere Door, the Somewhere Door opens a portal to a random location, but is otherwise similar in terms of functionality.

name: Werewolf Cream
info: Rub this on your face and look at something round  and youll turn into the face of a wolf!

name: Like A Rock Cap
info: Put this cap on and youll be like a pebble on a roadside  no one would notice or care for you.

name: Wishing Star
info: TheWishing Starflies to the person calling it and can grant his wishes. However, it is a subject of misunderstandings.

name: Justice Rope
info: Plant one of these seeds in soil, water it, and a vine-cyborg will grow. The cyborg will punish people who do wrong by tying them up for you.

name: Dictator Switch
info: The switch is capable of removing whatever subjects from existence at the user39s demand and the effect can be undone by pressing it again.
